version.description: QuIDBBIDS version that should match the version in resources/mpackage.json

HPC.description:
HPC resource requirements: memory in bytes (1Gb = 1e9), time in seconds. Any option that goes into qsubfeval() can be added, such as:
 [.., "options", "--partition=gpu --gres=gpu:1"]

B0dir.description: Main magnetic field direction with respect to FOV

kappa_mw.description: Jung, NI., myelin water density. Used to compute: rho_mw = kappa_mw/kappa_iew

kappa_iew.description: Jung, NI., intra-/extra-axonal water density. Used to compute: rho_mw = kappa_mw/kappa_iew

E.description: Exchange effect in signal phase, in ppm

FWHM.description: in mm, smoothing kernel for regularizing the B1 map

FAscaling.description: Factor to scale the data to radians (800 is what SIEMENS seems to use on TFL B1-mapping)

EchoSpacing.description: RepetitionTimeExcitation value in secs, default twice echo time when missing in JSON

NumberShots.description: Number of shots (NZslices) in inversion segment, also referred to as turbo factor; not usually in JSON. See: https://bids-specification.readthedocs.io/en/stable/appendices/qmri.html#numbershots-metadata-field

Fingerprint.description: Enable MP2RAGE-based fingerprinting (preferred option for mapping R1 of long/CSF and short/fat T1 values), if false a look-up table approach is used

B1correctM0.description: 0 = no correction; 1/2/3 applies a left-right, front-back or up-down flipped transmit field as an approximation of the receive field. Only use this option if the anatomical data is well centered in the field of view (as provided by auto-align) and if the bias Field correction was enabled on the scanner

iteration.description: Maximum number of GPU fitting iterations

convergenceWindow.description: Window size for estimating convergence (> 100 iterations for more robust estimate)

isInvivo.description: true = use initial starting points for in vivo study

isFastEPG.description: true = speed up the fitting by running a non EPG fitting first and use the results as the initial guesses of EPG fitting

isParallel.description: true = use parfor for parallel processing

isNormData.description: true = normalise the data by a global constant so that absolute tolerance will be used for fitting; use false if the data is already normalisation

fcnTol.description: fitting tolerance, this value is used for normalised data

stepTol.description: Step tolerance, this value is used for normalised data

numMagn.description: 0 = fitting with complex-valued data; length(TE) = fitting with magnitude data

isWeighted.description: true = use cost function weighted by echo intensity

weightMethod.description: Weighting with respect to the first echo of each flip angle acquisition. Options: '1stEcho' = weighted by 1st echo magnitude; 'quadratic_1stEcho' = weighted by squared 1st echo magnitude

isExchange.description: true = include BM equation to account for exchange effect; false = no magnetisation exchange

isEPG.description: true = use EPG-X for signal simulation; false = standard steady-state equation

npulse.description: Number of RF pulses to reach steady-state in EPG

rfphase.description: RF phase increment for EPG (degrees). Philips = 150

isT1mw.description: true = fit myelin water T1; false = use fixed value

advancedStarting.description: initial guesses for multi-comp S0. 'default' = estimated S0 and T2s IEW from data; 'robust' = estimated S0 from data only; otherwise fixed starting points for 3T

isVic.description: true = use DIMWI to account for intra-axonal volume fraction; false = no DIMWI

isR2sEW.description: true = use DIMWI to account for extra-axonal R2*; false = no DIMWI

isFreqMW.description: true = use DIMWI to account for myelin water frequency shift; false = no DIMWI

isFreqIW.description: true = use DIMWI to account for intra-axonal frequency shift; false = no DIMWI

isBET.description: Logical value of performing brain extraction in SEPIA

isRefineBrainMask.description: Exclude high R2* voxels from the edge of the brain mask

isInvert.description: Use conjugate of the complex-valued data for processing

isEddyCorrect.description: Logical value of performing phase correction on data acquired with bipolar readout gradient

isSaveUnwrappedEcho.description: Logical value of saving unwrapped phase for all echoes

excludeMaskThreshold.description: Threshold on relative residual map to exclude unreliable voxels

excludeMethod.description: Method of how the unreliable voxels to be excluded

refine_method.description: Method of residual B1 field removal

erode_radius.description: Voxel to be removed from mask edges after background field removal

erode_before_radius.description: Voxel to be removed from mask edges before background field removal

radius.description: Vector of radii of the spherical mean value operation in descending order

solver.description: Methods to be used for dipole field inversion

isBET.description: Logical value of performing brain extraction in SEPIA

isRefineBrainMask.description: Exclude high R2* voxels from the edge of the brain mask

isInvert.description: Use conjugate of the complex-valued data for processing

npulse.description: Number of pulses in EPG model
